---
title: "Data Management in Python"
source: "Workshop Material"
author: "Edina Harsay"
institution: "University of Kansas"
competency: [Data Wrangling, Programming Skills, Data Engineering]
tech-lang: [Python]
main-format: [Code, Data, PPT Slide]
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

This workshop introduces students to using Python for data analysis. We give an overview of proper setup of Python in a local environment and also using Python in Google Colab. We introduce Polars (a new alternative to pandas) and work with the BRFSS survey data from the CDC.

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/ku_Harsay_Python_CDC_BRFSS)

This Material is under the [CC BY license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en)
